name: second-opinions
description: Get validation from a different AI model before committing major changes — detects available LLM CLIs and routes to the best one.

interface.shortDescription: Get validation from a different AI model before committing major changes — detects available LLM CLIs and routes to the best one.
interface.longDescription: Get validation from a different AI model before committing major changes — detects available LLM CLIs and routes to the best one. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Get a second opinion on this implementation or design decision and summarize the strongest agreement, disagreement, and actionable feedback.
